name: sovereign-ai-containment
description: Sovereign AI Containment Layer — architecture-first containment platform with T3 trust anchoring.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @sovereign/t3-adapter && npm run build -w @sovereign/agent-passport && npm run build -w @sovereign/attestation && npm run build -w @sovereign/policy-engine && npm run dev -w @sovereign/api
scripts.generate-passport: npm run build -w @sovereign/agent-passport && npm run generate-passport -w @sovereign/agent-passport
